ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exoplanets" (
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exoplanet */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method used for detection */,
  "orbital_period" REAL /* Orbital period of the exoplanet in days */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the exoplanet in Jupiter masses */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the exoplanet from its host star in light years */,
  "discovery_year" INTEGER /* Year when the exoplanet was discovered */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the exoplanet */,
  "atmospheric_composition" TEXT /* Atmospheric composition of the exoplanet */,
  "spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the host star */,
  "star_age" REAL /* Age of the host star */,
  "star_mass" REAL /* Mass of the host star */,
  "star_radius" REAL /* Radius of the host star */,
  "star_luminosity" REAL /* Luminosity of the host star */,
  "habitability_index" REAL /* Habitability index of the exoplanet */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exoplanet's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exoplanet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exoplanets_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the detection method (e.g., Radial Velocity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the detection method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the detection method */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the detection method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with using the detection method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the method's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "star_systems" (
  "star_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star system */,
  "star_name" TEXT /* Name of the star in the system */,
  "constellation" TEXT /* Constellation where the star is located */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from Earth to the star system in light years */,
  "star_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the star */,
  "star_age" REAL /* Age of the star */,
  "star_mass" REAL /* Mass of the star */,
  "star_radius" REAL /* Radius of the star */,
  "star_luminosity" REAL /* Luminosity of the star */,
  "star_spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the star */,
  "number_of_exoplanets" INTEGER /* Number of exoplanets in the star system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the star system's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the researcher */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Field of research */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position within the institution */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the researcher */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation record */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exoplanet being observed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher making the observation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the observation */,
  "observatory" TEXT /* Name of the observatory where the observation was made */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Name of the instrument used for the observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the observational data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the observation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exoplanet discussed in the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication appeared */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was released */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the publication data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user accessing data */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exoplanet data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's session */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_exoplanet_id FOREIGN KEY ("exoplanet_id") REFERENCES exoplanets ("exoplanet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* JSON array of collaborator IDs */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_exoplanets" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated research project */,
  "exoplanet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated exoplanet */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the exoplanet in the project (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project-exoplanet relationship data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "exoplanet_id")
)
